sevenDay.synopsis: Weather's looking great for the entire forecast period! We expect VFR conditions with NEG hazards thru the weekend. Starting early next week, there is a slight chance for ISOLD showers/TS during the PM period, but that should not impact flight training.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 15 MAY - 21 MAY
